Claimants' (Bank Of America) Hearing On Disbursement Of Claims Of Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Nov-07-2014 Advanced From Nov-07-14 To Nov-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Claimants' (Bank Of America) Hearing On Disbursement Of Claims Of Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey R. Cluett, Esq., (510-653-8886) for 742 Fell Street, Defendant and moving party.
Jason A. Savlov, Esq., (714-277-4867) APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Claimant Bank of America.

ARGUED. Claimants' (Bank Of America) Hearing On Disbursement Of Claims Of Surplus Funds is taken under submission. Judge Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: B. Paredes, Not reporter (501)

Claimants' (Bank Of America) Hearing On Disbursement Of Claims Of Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Oct-27-2014 Continued To Nov-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Garett L. Wong; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

Claimants Bank Of America's Motion for Disbursement Of Claims Of Surplus Funds is continued to November 7, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 501. Parties are ordered to provide courtesy copies of filings in support of and in opposition to this motion no later that October 28, 2014 by 4:00 p.m.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Accept Deposit Of Surplus Funds, To Discharge Petitioner,...
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Apperances by court call: Atty: Kristin Webb (714-382-6438) appearing for Claimant Bank of America./ Atty. Joseph Buchman (213-236-0600) appearing for Petitioner MTC Financial.

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Motion For Order To Accept Deposit Of Surplus Funds, To Discharge Petitioner is GRANTED. Motion is unopposed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Not Reported. (D501)
